description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 2nd; Slot ring; Price 2,500 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This ring continually allows the wearer to leap about, providing a +5 competence bonus on all his Acrobatics checks made to make high or long jumps. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Forge Ring; Special creator must have 5 ranks in the Acrobatics skill; Cost 1,250 gp
